# Compliance and Policy Mapping

## Purpose
This document shows how the initiative, application, or platform aligns with applicable corporate policies, standards, and governance requirements.

## Guidance for completion
Use one row per relevant policy requirement. The "How Addressed" column should describe the practical implementation or operating process used to satisfy the requirement. Evidence Location should point to the supporting document or artifact.

| Policy / Standard | Requirement | Applies To | How Addressed | Evidence Location | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| <Policy / Standard Name> | <Requirement> | <System / App / Process / Scope> | <Implementation / Control / Process> | <Document / Artifact Reference> | <Owner> |
